section.heading: Imposition of sanctions under Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act

subsection.heading: In general
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, should evaluate whether there are foreign persons engaged in significant corruption for the purposes of potential imposition of sanctions under the Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act (subtitle F of title XII of Public Law 114–328; 22 U.S.C. 10101 et seq.)—

paragraph.content: in all countries identified pursuant to section 10502(b) of this title; and
in relation to the planning or construction or any operation of the Nord Stream 2 pipeline.

subsection.heading: Report required
subsection.chapeau: Not later than 180 days after providing the list required by section 10502(b) of this title, and annually thereafter, the Secretary of State shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report that includes—

paragraph.content: a list of foreign persons with respect to which the President imposed sanctions pursuant to the evaluation under subsection (a);
the dates on which such sanctions were imposed;
the reasons for imposing such sanctions; and
a list of all foreign persons that have engaged in significant corruption in relation to the planning, construction, or operation of the Nord Stream 2 pipeline.

content.p: Each report required by subsection (b) shall be submitted in unclassified form but may include a classified annex.

The Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, may, instead of submitting a written report required under subsection (b) (except with respect to the list required by subsection (b)(4)), provide to the appropriate congressional committees a briefing, together with a written justification, if doing so would better serve the national interests of the United States.

subsection.heading: Termination of requirements relating to Nord Stream 2

content.p: The requirements under subsections (a)(2) and (b)(4) shall terminate on the date that is 5 years after December 22, 2023.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: The Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is subtitle F (§§ 1261–1264) of title XII of div. A of Pub. L. 114–328, Dec. 23, 2016, 130 Stat. 2533, which is classified generally to chapter 108 (§ 10101 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 10101 of this title and Tables.
